events.content:
The return window for jackets can vary based on the specific item you're looking at. However, as of my last check, there is no standard uniform return policy applied to all jackets across Zephyra Outfitters' collection.

Could you please specify which jacket you are interested in? Once I have that information, I'll be able to provide more detailed details regarding its return window and any relevant policies or procedures.
